nasb.text: It came about when the sons of Israel became strong, they put the Canaanites to forced labor, but they did not drive them out completely.

esv.text: Now when the people of Israel grew strong, they put the Canaanites to forced labor, but did not utterly drive them out.

cnv.text: 以色列人強盛以後，就迫使迦南人作苦工，卻沒有把他們完全趕出去。

ccb.text: 当以色列人国势强盛的时候，就让迦南人服劳役，但始终没有把他们完全赶走。
